---
title: "Motor Vehicle Collision Heatmap of New York City"
description: "Interactive web app visualizing NYC traffic accidents with real-time data."
date: "2024-04"
categories: [Python, Streamlit, Data Visualization, Folium]
---

## Overview

Designed an interactive web app with Python, Folium, and Streamlit to visualize NYC traffic accidents. Information is pulled from a real-time NYC traffic database and displayed on an interactive heatmap.

## Approach

- Connected to NYC's open traffic collision dataset
- Built an interactive heatmap layer with Folium
- Deployed the app as a Streamlit web application

## Tools & Technologies

- Python
- Streamlit
- Folium
